items.headline: The Trade Desk Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results: Revenue $689M, 12% YoY Growth, But Outlook and Exec Departure Weigh on Shares
TTD Stock Sinks Overnight on Weak Outlook as Q2 Revenue Guidance Misses Street and Chief Strategy Officer Departs for OpenAI
The Trade Desk Stock Falls After Recent Earnings Miss Drives Shares Lower
